examples.title: Pseudocode: System Call Mechanism
examples.description: Illustrates the step-by-step process of a system call
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the system call mechanism, including invocation, preparation, trap, execution, and return.

examples.title: C: System Call Example
examples.description: A simple C program using the read() API, which triggers the sys_read system call
examples.explanation: This C program uses the read() API to read from standard input, which triggers the sys_read system call.

examples.title: C: System Call Wrapper
examples.description: A C program that wraps the write() system call to print a message
examples.explanation: This C program wraps the write() system call to print a message, demonstrating how APIs can abstract system calls.
